description.zh-Hans: 生成可平铺的砖块/瓷砖图案，支持半砖行偏移。
description.en: Generates tileable brick/tile patterns with half-brick row offset.

triggers.zh-Hans: 砖块, 砖墙, 砖瓦, 砌体, 建筑纹理
triggers.en: brick, brick wall, brick pattern, masonry, wall texture

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成可平铺的砖墙纹理，用于建筑场景或角色扮演游戏中的墙壁材质。
exampleUsage.en: Generate a tileable brick wall texture for architectural scenes or RPG wall materials.
